en: After the plague, the LORD said to Moses and to Eleazar the son of Aaron, the priest,
zh: 瘟疫以後，耶和華對摩西和亞倫的兒子以利亞撒說：

en: "Take a census of all the congregation of the people of Israel, from twenty years old and upward, by their fathers' houses, all in Israel who are able to go to war."
zh: “你們要把以色列會眾，從二十歲以上，在以色列中能出去打仗的，按著他們的父家，計算數目。”

en: And Moses and Eleazar the priest spoke with them in the plains of Moab by the Jordan at Jericho, saying,
zh: 於是，摩西和以利亞撒祭司在摩押曠野，就是在耶利哥附近的約旦河邊，告訴他們：

en: "Take a census of the people, from twenty years old and upward," as the LORD commanded Moses. The people of Israel who came out of the land of Egypt were:
zh: “從二十歲以上的，你們都要登記數目。”這是照著耶和華吩咐摩西的。從埃及地出來的以色列人計有：

en: Reuben, the firstborn of Israel; the sons of Reuben: of Hanoch, the clan of the Hanochites; of Pallu, the clan of the Palluites;
zh: 以色列的長子流本：流本的子孫，屬哈諾的，有哈諾家族；屬法路的，有法路家族；

en: of Hezron, the clan of the Hezronites; of Carmi, the clan of the Carmites.
zh: 屬希斯倫的，有希斯倫家族；屬迦米的，有迦米家族。

en: These are the clans of the Reubenites, and those listed were 43,730.
zh: 這些是流本的家族；他們被數點的，共有四萬三千七百三十人。

en: And the sons of Pallu: Eliab.
zh: 法路的兒子是以利押；

en: The sons of Eliab: Nemuel, Dathan, and Abiram. These are the Dathan and Abiram, chosen from the congregation, who contended against Moses and Aaron in the company of Korah, when they contended against the LORD
zh: 以利押的兒子是尼母利、大坍、亞比蘭。這大坍和亞比蘭原是從會眾中選拔出來的，他們和可拉一黨的人一起與耶和華爭吵，也與摩西和亞倫爭吵的時候，

en: and the earth opened its mouth and swallowed them up together with Korah, when that company died, when the fire devoured 250 men, and they became a warning.
zh: 地開了口，把他們和可拉吞了下去；可拉與他的同黨都死了，那時有火吞滅了二百五十個人，他們成了警戒。

en: But the sons of Korah did not die.
zh: 但是，可拉的子孫卻沒有死亡。

en: The sons of Simeon according to their clans: of Nemuel, the clan of the Nemuelites; of Jamin, the clan of the Ja-minites; of Jachin, the clan of the Jachinites;
zh: 西緬子孫，按著家族，屬尼母利的，有尼母利家族；屬雅憫的，有雅憫家族；屬雅斤的，有雅斤家族；

en: of Zerah, the clan of the Zerahites; of Shaul, the clan of the Sha-ulites.
zh: 屬謝拉的，有謝拉家族；屬掃羅的，有掃羅家族。

en: These are the clans of the Simeonites, 22,200.
zh: 這些就是西緬的各家族，共有二萬二千二百人。

en: The sons of Gad according to their clans: of Zephon, the clan of the Zephonites; of Haggi, the clan of the Haggites; of Shuni, the clan of the Shunites;
zh: 迦得子孫，按著家族，屬洗分的，有洗分家族；屬哈基的，有哈基家族；屬書尼的，有書尼家族；

en: of Ozni, the clan of the Oznites; of Eri, the clan of the Erites;
zh: 屬阿斯尼的，有阿斯尼家族；屬以利的，有以利家族；

en: of Arod, the clan of the Arodites; of Areli, the clan of the Arelites.
zh: 屬亞律的，有亞律家族；屬亞列利的，有亞列利家族。

en: These are the clans of the sons of Gad as they were listed, 40,500.
zh: 這些就是迦得子孫的各家族，按著他們各家族被數點的，共有四萬零五百人。

en: The sons of Judah were Er and Onan; and Er and Onan died in the land of Canaan.
zh: 猶大的兒子是珥和俄南；這珥和俄南都死在迦南地。

en: And the sons of Judah according to their clans were: of Shelah, the clan of the Shelanites; of Perez, the clan of the Perezites; of Zerah, the clan of the Zerahites.
zh: 猶大子孫，按著家族，屬示拉的，有示拉家族；屬法勒斯的，有法勒斯家族；屬謝拉的，有謝拉家族。

en: And the sons of Perez were: of Hezron, the clan of the Hezronites; of Hamul, the clan of the Hamulites.
zh: 法勒斯的子孫，屬希斯崙的，有希斯崙家族；屬哈母勒的，有哈母勒家族。

en: These are the clans of Judah as they were listed, 76,500.
zh: 這些就是猶大的各家族，按著他們各家族被數點的，共有七萬六千五百人。

en: The sons of Issachar according to their clans: of Tola, the clan of the Tolaites; of Puvah, the clan of the Punites;
zh: 以薩迦的子孫，按著家族，屬陀拉的，有陀拉家族；屬普瓦的，有普瓦家族；

en: of Jashub, the clan of the Ja-shubites; of Shimron, the clan of the Shimronites.
zh: 屬雅述的，有雅述家族；屬伸崙的，有伸崙家族。

en: These are the clans of Issachar as they were listed, 64,300.
zh: 這些就是以薩迦的各家族，按著他們各家族被數點的，共有六萬四千三百人。

en: The sons of Zebulun, according to their clans: of Sered, the clan of the Seredites; of Elon, the clan of the Elonites; of Jahleel, the clan of the Jah-leelites.
zh: 西布倫的子孫，按著家族，屬西烈的，有西烈家族；屬以倫的，有以倫家族；屬雅利的，有雅利家族。

en: These are the clans of the Zeb-ulunites as they were listed, 60,500.
zh: 這些就是西布倫的各家族，按著他們各家族被數點的，共有六萬零五百人。

en: The sons of Joseph according to their clans: Manasseh and Ephraim.
zh: 約瑟的兒子，按著家族，有瑪拿西和以法蓮。

en: The sons of Manasseh: of Machir, the clan of the Machirites; and Machir was the father of Gilead; of Gilead, the clan of the Gileadites.
zh: 瑪拿西的子孫，屬瑪吉的，有瑪吉家族；瑪吉生基列；屬基列的，有基列家族。

en: These are the sons of Gilead: of Iezer, the clan of the Iezerites; of Helek, the clan of the Helekites;
zh: 以下就是基列的子孫：屬伊以謝的，有伊以謝家族；屬希勒的，有希勒家族；

en: and of Asriel, the clan of the Asrielites; and of Shechem, the clan of the Shechemites;
zh: 屬亞斯列的，有亞斯列家族；屬示劍的，有示劍家族；

en: and of Shemida, the clan of the Shemidaites; and of Hepher, the clan of the Hepherites.
zh: 屬示米大的，有示米大家族；屬希弗的，有希弗家族。

en: Now Zelophehad the son of Hepher had no sons, but daughters. And the names of the daughters of Zelophehad were Mahlah, Noah, Hoglah, Milcah, and Tirzah.
zh: 希弗的兒子西羅非哈沒有兒子，只有女兒；西羅非哈的女兒名叫瑪拉、挪阿、曷拉、密迦、得撒。

en: These are the clans of Manasseh, and those listed were 52,700.
zh: 這些就是瑪拿西的各家族，他們被數點的，共有五萬二千七百人。

en: These are the sons of Ephraim according to their clans: of Shuthelah, the clan of the Shuthelahites; of Becher, the clan of the Becherites; of Tahan, the clan of the Tahanites.
zh: 以下就是以法蓮的子孫：按著家族，屬書提拉的，有書提拉家族；屬比結的，有比結家族；屬他罕的，有他罕家族。

en: And these are the sons of Shuthelah: of Eran, the clan of the Eranites.
zh: 書提拉的子孫，屬以蘭的，有以蘭家族。

en: These are the clans of the sons of Ephraim as they were listed, 32,500. These are the sons of Joseph according to their clans.
zh: 這些就是以法蓮子孫的各家族，按著他們各家族被數點的，共有三萬二千五百人。按著他們的家族，這些都是約瑟的子孫。

en: The sons of Benjamin according to their clans: of Bela, the clan of the Belaites; of Ashbel, the clan of the Ashbelites; of Ahiram, the clan of the Ahiramites;
zh: 便雅憫的子孫，按著家族，屬比拉的，有比拉家族；屬亞實別的，有亞實別家族；屬亞希蘭的，有亞希蘭家族；

en: of Shephupham, the clan of the Shuphamites; of Hupham, the clan of the Huphamites.
zh: 屬書反的，有書反家族；屬戶反的，有戶反家族。

en: And the sons of Bela were Ard and Naaman: of Ard, the clan of the Ardites; of Naaman, the clan of the Naamites.
zh: 比拉的眾子是亞勒、乃幔；屬亞勒的，有亞勒家族；屬乃幔的，有乃幔家族。

en: These are the sons of Benjamin according to their clans, and those listed were 45,600.
zh: 這些就是便雅憫的子孫，按著他們的家族，他們被數點的，共有四萬五千六百人。

en: These are the sons of Dan according to their clans: of Shuham, the clan of the Shuhamites. These are the clans of Dan according to their clans.
zh: 以下是但的子孫：按著家族，屬書含的，有書含家族；按著家族，這些就是但的各家族。

en: All the clans of the Shuhamites, as they were listed, were 64,400.
zh: 書含所有的家族，被數點的，共有六萬四千四百人。

en: The sons of Asher according to their clans: of Imnah, the clan of the Imnites; of Ishvi, the clan of the Ishvites; of Beriah, the clan of the Beriites.
zh: 亞設的子孫，按著他們的家族，屬音拿的，有音拿家族；屬亦施葦的，有亦施葦家族；屬比利亞的，有比利亞家族。

en: Of the sons of Beriah: of Heber, the clan of the Heberites; of Malchiel, the clan of the Malchielites.
zh: 比利亞的子孫，屬希別的，有希別家族；屬瑪結的，有瑪結家族。

en: And the name of the daughter of Asher was Serah.
zh: 亞設的女兒名叫西拉。

en: These are the clans of the sons of Asher as they were listed, 53,400.
zh: 這些就是亞設子孫的各家族，按著他們各家族被數點的，共有五萬三千四百人。

en: The sons of Naphtali according to their clans: of Jahzeel, the clan of the Jahzeelites; of Guni, the clan of the Gunites;
zh: 拿弗他利的子孫，按著家族，屬雅薛的，有雅薛家族；屬沽尼的，有沽尼家族；

en: of Jezer, the clan of the Jezerites; of Shillem, the clan of the Shillemites.
zh: 屬耶色的，有耶色家族；屬示冷的，有示冷家族。

en: These are the clans of Naphtali according to their clans, and those listed were 45,400.
zh: 這些就是拿弗他利的各家族，按著他們各家族被數點的，共有四萬五千四百人。

en: This was the list of the people of Israel, 601,730.
zh: 以上就是以色列人被數點的，共有六十萬零一千七百三十人。

en: The LORD spoke to Moses, saying,
zh: 耶和華對摩西說：

en: "Among these the land shall be divided for inheritance according to the number of names.
zh: “你要按著人名數目把地分配給他們作產業。

en: To a large tribe you shall give a large inheritance, and to a small tribe you shall give a small inheritance; every tribe shall be given its inheritance in proportion to its list.
zh: 人數多的，你要把產業多分給他們；人數少的，你要把產業少分給他們；要按著數點的人數，把產業分給各家族。

en: But the land shall be divided by lot. According to the names of the tribes of their fathers they shall inherit.
zh: 雖然這樣，地還是要藉著抽籤分配；他們要按著自己父家支派的名字，承受產業。

en: Their inheritance shall be divided according to lot between the larger and the smaller."
zh: 你要按著所抽的籤，照著人數的多少，把產業分配給他們。”

en: This was the list of the Levites according to their clans: of Gershon, the clan of the Gershonites; of Kohath, the clan of the Kohathites; of Merari, the clan of the Merarites.
zh: 以下是按著家族被數點的利未人：屬革順的，有革順家族；屬哥轄的，有哥轄家族；屬米拉利的，有米拉利家族。

en: These are the clans of Levi: the clan of the Libnites, the clan of the Hebronites, the clan of the Mahlites, the clan of the Mushites, the clan of the Korahites. And Kohath was the father of Amram.
zh: 這些就是利未的各家族：有立尼家族、希伯倫家族、瑪利家族、母示家族、可拉家族。哥轄生暗蘭。

en: The name of Amram's wife was Jochebed the daughter of Levi, who was born to Levi in Egypt. And she bore to Amram Aaron and Moses and Miriam their sister.
zh: 暗蘭的妻子，名叫約基別，是利未的女兒，是利未在埃及所生的；她給暗蘭生了亞倫、摩西和他們的姊姊米利暗。

en: And to Aaron were born Nadab, Abihu, Eleazar, and Ithamar.
zh: 亞倫生拿答、亞比戶、以利亞撒、以他瑪。

en: But Nadab and Abihu died when they offered unauthorized fire before the LORD.
zh: 拿答和亞比戶在耶和華面前獻凡火的時候，死了。

en: And those listed were 23,000, every male from a month old and upward. For they were not listed among the people of Israel, because there was no inheritance given to them among the people of Israel.
zh: 利未人中，從一個月以上被數點的所有男丁，共有二萬三千人。在以色列人中沒有數點他們，因為在以色列人中，沒有把產業分給他們。

en: These were those listed by Moses and Eleazar the priest, who listed the people of Israel in the plains of Moab by the Jordan at Jericho.
zh: 以上的人就是被摩西和以利亞撒祭司數點的；他們是在摩押平原，耶利哥對面約旦河邊數點以色列人的。

en: But among these there was not one of those listed by Moses and Aaron the priest, who had listed the people of Israel in the wilderness of Sinai.
zh: 這些人中間，沒有一個是摩西和亞倫祭司從前在西奈曠野數點以色列人的時候，數點過的。

en: For the LORD had said of them, "They shall die in the wilderness." Not one of them was left, except Caleb the son of Jephunneh and Joshua the son of Nun.
zh: 因為耶和華論到他們曾經說過：“他們必死在曠野。”所以除了耶孚尼的兒子迦勒和嫩的兒子約書亞以外，連一個也沒有剩下。
